scripts.build:wasm: pnpm build:wasm:web && pnpm build:wasm:node && node scripts/prepare-wasm-package.mjs
scripts.build:wasm:web: node scripts/run-wasm-pack.mjs build crates/lens-wasm --target web --release --out-dir ../../apps/web/lib/wasm/lens --out-name lens_wasm
scripts.build:wasm:node: node scripts/run-wasm-pack.mjs build crates/lens-wasm --target nodejs --release --out-dir ../../apps/web/lib/wasm/lens-node --out-name lens_wasm_node
scripts.verify: pnpm test:web && pnpm typecheck:web && pnpm lint:web && pnpm build:wasm && pnpm build:web && cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
